title: hippomarathrum crispum
intro: Hippomarathrum crispum, also known as sweet cicely, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) with a sweet anise-like flavor and aroma. The medicinal properties of sweet cicely include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of consuming sweet cicely include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of sweet cicely include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
